allow: Bash(sed -i 's/\\.map\(m =>/\\.map\(\(m: any\) =>/g; s/\\.map\(mem =>/\\.map\(\(mem: any\) =>/g; s/\\.map\(i =>/\\.map\(\(i: any\) =>/g; s/\\.map\(s =>/\\.map\(\(s: any\) =>/g' apps/web-app/src/app/api/teams/route.ts 'apps/web-app/src/app/api/teams/[id]/members/route.ts' 'apps/web-app/src/app/api/teams/[id]/invite/route.ts' 'apps/web-app/src/app/api/workflows/[id]/share/route.ts')

Bash(node -e 'const d=require\('\\''./__TRACKED_VAR__'\\''\); console.log\('\\''Events:'\\'', d.normalizedEvents.length, '\\''Steps:'\\'', d.derivedSteps.length\); const eids=new Set\(d.normalizedEvents.map\(e=>e.event_id\)\); d.derivedSteps.forEach\(s=>{s.source_event_ids.forEach\(id=>{if\(!eids.has\(id\)\) console.error\('\\''MISSING ref:'\\'',id,'\\''in step'\\'',s.step_id\)}\)}\); const ords=d.derivedSteps.map\(s=>s.ordinal\); for\(let i=0;i<ords.length;i++\){if\(ords[i]!==i+1\) console.error\('\\''BAD ordinal at'\\'',i,ords[i]\)}; d.derivedSteps.forEach\(s=>{const expected=d.sessionJson.sessionId+'\\''-step-'\\''+s.ordinal; if\(s.step_id!==expected\) console.error\('\\''BAD step_id:'\\'',s.step_id,'\\''expected:'\\'',expected\)}\); console.log\('\\''OK'\\''\)')

Bash(node -e 'const d=require\('\\''./__TRACKED_VAR__'\\''\); console.log\('\\''Events:'\\'', d.normalizedEvents.length, '\\''Steps:'\\'', d.derivedSteps.length, '\\''PolicyLog:'\\'', d.policyLog.length\)')
